startups.title: Pinwheel launches a retro-inspired landline phone for kids
startups.summary: The kid-focused tech company announced Tuesday the launch of Pinwheel Home, a modern take on the classic household phone designed to let children stay connected without the distractions of a smartphone. Instead of texting or doomscrolling on social media, Pinwheel Home is built solely for voice calls. Calls between Pinwheel Home devices are free through the company’s Pinwheel Circle service.

I haven’t really had this issue with Siri AI on watchOS 27. In watchOS 26, Workout Buddy mostly surfaced milestones.

wider_tech.title: Siri AI is already changing how I use my iPhone
wider_tech.summary: App entities and intents allow Siri to control and pull data from them, and Siri’s semantic layer handles the understanding of your words. This time, Apple is asking developers to update their apps to improve the Siri experience. Not only is this a beta OS, but a beta Siri.

wider_tech.title: The macOS 27 public beta is worth it just for the Liquid Glass tweaks
wider_tech.summary: The macOS 27 Golden Gate public beta is here , and anyone with an M-series Mac now has easier access to test-drive Apple’s latest changes — including a more subdued Liquid Glass aesthetic. And aside from dialing down Liquid Glass, that is what Golden Gate feels like. Even though I don’t care much for Siri AI and the new Apple Intelligence features, I much prefer Golden Gate to Tahoe.
